## All-new Pixar Pals Spectacular

The all-new “Pixar Pals Spectacular,” a light-filled aerial adventure celebrating friendship through beloved Pixar stories, will debut as a nighttime highlight taking place before the “Momentous” nighttime spectacular. This experience will delight guests with fan-favorite Pixar characters and stories brought to life through music, storytelling, and dazzling visuals in the sky, creating an unforgettable moment.

![hkdl](https://cdn1.parksmedia.wdprapps.disney.com/resize/mwImage/1/170/96/75/vision-dam/digital/hkdl-platform/hkdl-standard-assets/special-offers/hkdl-ent-momentous-16x9.jpg?2022-11-08T04:16:44+00:00)

## “Momentous” Nighttime Spectacular

The long-awaited nighttime spectacular has arrived. Are you ready for the most mesmerizing nighttime experience in Hong Kong? Guests will open their hearts to a heartwarming extravaganza and all-new nighttime spectacular at Hong Kong Disneyland, called “Momentous.” The much-anticipated magical show filled with magic and light will illuminate the night sky with over 20 minutes of music and memorable moments in one monumental journey.

The brand-new Disney spectacular “Momentous” will delight your senses with various multimedia elements, including state-of-the-art 3D projection mapping technology, choreographed fountains, illuminated water projection, lasers, theatrical lighting, pyrotechnics, and fireworks effects. What’s more, your ears will be regaled with newly-reimagined iconic Disney songs. It’s a spellbinding experience that’s sure to melt hearts, warm smiles, and reawaken beloved memories.

What’s more, your ears will be regaled with newly-reimagined iconic Disney songs. It’s a spellbinding experience that’s sure to melt hearts, warm smiles, and reawaken beloved memories.

![](https://cdn1.parksmedia.wdprapps.disney.com/resize/mwImage/1/170/96/75/vision-dam/digital/hkdl-platform/hkdl-standard-assets/finder_hk/en-intl/system/images/g-l/hkdl-ent-wondrous-book-hero-00.jpg?2022-05-21T23:34:50+00:00)

## Mickey and the Wondrous Book - Where Stories Come to Life

A spectacularly unique “Happily Ever After” show has been created to bring to life new and classic Disney stories and movies in an exhilarating, musical revue stage production like no other!  
  
Disney’s Storybook Theater will be transformed into an antique yet modern-day library, home to “Mickey and the Wondrous Book.” The 28-minute musical revue features a cast of live vocalists, Disney characters and dancers. As every page turns a new story is reviewed, revealing a grandiose and extravagant musical production number!

:   **”Disney Premier Access – 3 Attractions”**  
      
    **Important Details**

    1. “Disney Premier Access – 3 Attractions” Attraction Admission Pass (each a “Pass”) may be used for priority admission to designated attractions in the Hong Kong Disneyland Park (“Park”) subject to these Terms and Conditions. The attractions for which the Pass may be used are available on the Pass offer page on the Hong Kong Disneyland website ( “Website”) and the Hong Kong Disneyland official mobile application (“App”) designated by Hongkong International Theme Parks Limited (“HKITP”).
    2. Passes are available for purchase on the Website, the App and at designated locations in the Hong Kong Disneyland Resort (“Resort”) as HKITP may from time to time determine.
    3. When completing the online purchase, guest is required to (i) sign in to his/her MyDisney HK account, (ii) select the type of the Pass, (iii) provide his/her payment method information and (iv) other forms of personal data as HKITP may require. A confirmation email will be sent to the email address provided at the time of purchase.
    4. Pass will be issued and stored in the following Pass media: (i) for Pass purchased on the Website and the App, in the “My Purchases” page of the Web and “My Disney Premier Access” section of the App; (ii) for Passes purchased in the Resort, in the Guest’s admission ticket to the Park; or (iii) for Pass purchased via other online sales channels, in the confirmation email issued to guest (collectively, “Pass Media”).
    5. Guests may not cancel or amend the type, validity date and other details of the Pass after the purchase.
    6. The Pass does not include admission to the Park. To use the Pass, Guests are required to have valid admission tickets and Park visit reservation for the validity date of the Pass. Park visit reservations are subject to limited quota.
    7. Passes purchased online are only valid for use on the date printed on the confirmation email. Passes purchased in the Resort are only valid for use on the date of purchase. Pass not used on the validity date will be void without compensation, exchange or refund.
    8. The Pass must be used by the same guest on its validity date. HKITP may require the guest to present his/her personal identification or provide such other information as HKITP may require for verification purpose.
    9. If a selected attraction is closed on the validity date of the Pass, the Pass may be used once for priority entrance on the same day to one other attraction listed by HKITP for that type of the Pass, subject to the availability, capacity and operating hours of such substitute attraction. In any circumstances, the Pass may not be used for repeated entry to any substitute attraction. No refund, extension or other compensation will be provided.
    10. The Pass is non-transferrable, non-exchangeable, non-refundable, not for resale and subject to availability.
    11. HKITP reserves the right at any time to refuse to accept the Pass or allow priority entrance to any attraction without refund or compensation if in its sole judgment (i) the Pass and/or its benefits are used for commercial or other unauthorised purposes; (ii) if any of these Terms and Conditions is violated or not complied with; and/or (iii) if HKITP considers that the circumstances so require.
    12.
